reviews.review_title: One of best strategy games on Go
reviews.review_description: Already finished it, had a blast. Wishing there was a game+ mode with higher difficulty so that you have a reason to ginish it again. Supports 72hz. Now I'm waiting for Astreus 2.

The more I played the more I appreciated how brilliantly this game was designed. Simple controls, but a world of strategy. A game perfectly created for the Go. Drained the battery several times trying to beat a single level. AI doesn't cut you any slack.

You are like Ender, controlling squadrons that surround you with a flick of my wrist. Action, observation, counter-action. As the AI amends his strategy mid-game, so must you. This game could not exist outside of VR, and I think that is what makes it so work so well inside VR. Excited to see what a game like this will be on the Quest.

reviews.review_title: Very slick graphics and a ton of fun
reviews.review_description: This developer keeps kicking b. Darknet was a superslick game and this game equally is amazingly well done. Story, sound effects, the gameplay itself is simply fun and entertaining. Action is fast, but since the developer understands how to navigate the VR 3D space extremely well, you never get motion sickness. Need to see if this game has multiplayer as well in future updates. Highly recommended.
Gameplay is addictive and I really love the story. If you like RTS then get it.

If you enjoy strategy games this is a must own for people. The missions take about 10-20 minutes to complete (so far) and the visuals are fantastic. The controls are solid on my oculus go and I'm having a blast building my space mining empire. Thanks for this gem of a game.

I'm not the biggest strategy gamer, more of a shooter type, but this game is great. Basically it starts with you controlling one world and then you try to expand by conquering other "grey" worlds. About halfway through you see that there are other players are doing the same. You are then battling them while trying to mine, which gives you points. You need more worlds to mine fast, but have to use your resources wisely. 10/10, especially since I read he's a solo indie developer.
Its fun, easy to learn how to play, and not too difficult enough to make you want to quit playing. The controls are pretty simple as well, and someone new to VR could learn to use them quickly.
Great strategy game, very easy to pick up and hard to put down!  Wow!

I’m a huge fan of real-time strategy games on mobile. This takes the fun to a whole new level (or should I say “dimension”)! First game on the Go that really hooked me. Only suggestion would be to have the asteroids change appearance based on the type of base you create. Not a big deal, but it would be really cool and make the game even more fun.

reviews.review_title: Great simple and fast strategic game
reviews.review_description: The game is really simple to start playing. The games a little shorter then other strategy games. Great graphics and experience but it is not online RTS multiplayer game. In the multiplayer you only attack two times a day and the opponent is AI. I think the RTS should be online multiplayer. Thanks.

Like many reviewers before me I love this game! Wish it was longer, has more difficult level's but I keep resetting the game and starting it over and over again. It does misbehave sometimes by freezing up and exiting to the main menu at time's but still it's unique, somewhat challenging very similar to checker's in that it's a game that even once mastered still holds some entertainment value.
Awesome one of the best games on the go, and one of my fav strategy games. Please make more levals.
It’s a fun pastime. I probably wouldn’t play it for more than about half an hour at a time, but it’s definitely worth the price.
